• Match-3 puzzle game with voxel-style 3D blocks
  • Complete pixel art by filling target pixels with collected blocks
  • Swap adjacent blocks to create matches of 3+ same colors
  • Special blocks: Line clears entire row/column, Color bomb clears all of that color
  • Custom art importer with drag-and-drop image processing
    const gameState = { IDLE: 0, SWAPPING: 1, MATCHING: 2, DROPPING: 3, SHUFFLING: 4, WON: 5 };
    function findMatches() { /* checks rows/columns for 3+ same color */ }

VOXEL CRASH combines match-3 mechanics with pixel art completion. Players swap blocks to match colors, clear them, and collect pixels to fill target art. The game features 3D voxel graphics, special power-up blocks, and a custom art importer that converts images into playable levels.
